title: Furniture Interaction Points and Activity State Machine
description: Extend the character FSM with ACTIVITY state. Define interaction points for 8 furniture types. Unify wander code paths. Add CEO office restriction. Implement paired activities. Add activity bubble icons.

scope.in: Character state machine extension, interaction point registry, furniture-weighted idle routing, CEO office zone restriction, paired activity logic, activity bubble icons
scope.out: New sprite frame authoring, sound effects, furniture placement changes

dod.criterion: Agents visibly interact with 5+ different furniture types when idle
At least one paired activity works (two agents at same furniture)
Agents respect CEO office zone restriction (non-CEO agents avoid it)
Activity bubble icons appear above agents during furniture activities
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Define InteractionPoint type and FurnitureActivityType enum
tasks.user_scenario: Developer type definitions for interaction points and activity types so subsequent tasks can build on a stable contract.
tasks.scope: Add InteractionPoint interface and FurnitureActivityType enum to pixel-types.ts. Add ACTIVITY to CharacterState. Add activityTarget, activityStartTime, activityType to Character interface. Initialize in createCharacter.

dod.criterion: CharacterState has ACTIVITY value alongside IDLE, WALK, TYPE
InteractionPoint interface exported from pixel-types.ts with all fields (id, furnitureType, tileX, tileY, facing, capacity, zoneId, activityDurationMin, activityDurationMax)
FurnitureActivityType enum exported with 8 activity types
Character interface has activityTarget, activityStartTime, activityType fields
createCharacter initializes the 3 new fields (null, 0, null)
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Create static INTERACTION_POINTS registry in constants.ts
tasks.user_scenario: Hand-mapped registry of interaction points for each piece of interactive furniture so the wander system knows where agents can use furniture.
tasks.scope: Add INTERACTION_POINTS array to constants.ts. Hand-map coordinates for 8 furniture types from the 32x32 grid. Add getInteractionPointsForZone and getAvailableInteractionPoint helpers.

dod.criterion: INTERACTION_POINTS array in constants.ts with at least 8 entries covering all furniture types
Each entry has valid tile coordinates that are walkable (not blocked) in the current office layout
getInteractionPointsForZone function filters points by zone and is exported
getAvailableInteractionPoint accepts a Set of occupied point IDs and returns available point or null
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Implement ACTIVITY state in character FSM
tasks.user_scenario: Idle agents walk to furniture, perform an activity animation for a duration, then resume wandering.
tasks.scope: Add ACTIVITY case to updateCharacter switch. Hold position, play appropriate existing animation frames, count down duration, exit to IDLE. Add getCharacterSprite handling for ACTIVITY.

dod.criterion: updateCharacter handles CharacterState.ACTIVITY — holds position, advances animation, exits after duration
getCharacterSprite returns typing frames for WATCHING_TV/ARCADE, reading frames for READING, idle frame for LOUNGING/EXERCISING/PLAYING_POOL/PLAYING_PINGPONG
ACTIVITY state resets personality animation on entry
Character transitions from ACTIVITY to IDLE with fresh wanderTimer when duration expires
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Unify wander destination picking through officeState
tasks.user_scenario: Idle agents naturally gravitate toward furniture 60% of the time and wander randomly 40%, instead of always picking random tiles.
tasks.scope: Add occupiedPoints Set to officeState. Add pickWanderDestination method (60% furniture, 40% random). Remove duplicate random tile picking from characters.ts IDLE branch. officeState drives destination selection.

dod.criterion: officeState.ts has occupiedPoints Set tracking interaction points occupied by ACTIVITY-state characters
pickWanderDestination method exists on OfficeState with 60/40 furniture/random weighting
characters.ts IDLE wander case no longer directly picks from walkableTiles array
Agents arriving at interaction points transition to ACTIVITY state with correct activityType, facing, and duration
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Add CEO office zone restriction for non-CEO agents
tasks.user_scenario: Only the CEO character and agents seated in the CEO office wander into that zone — other agents avoid it.
tasks.scope: Add restricted flag to RoomZone. Set ceo-office restricted: true. Filter in pickWanderDestination and chooseDestination unless agent's seat is in that zone.

dod.criterion: RoomZone interface has optional restricted boolean field
ceo-office zone has restricted: true in ROOM_ZONES
pickWanderDestination skips interaction points in restricted zones for agents whose seat is not in that zone
chooseDestination idle routing excludes restricted zones unless agent seat is in that zone
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Implement paired activity for capacity-2 furniture
tasks.user_scenario: Two agents use the pool table or ping pong table simultaneously — one arrives and starts, then a second agent joins at the adjacent use-tile.
tasks.scope: Support capacity-2 with secondary use-tile on InteractionPoint. Track partial/full occupancy. Second agent paths to secondary tile. When either finishes, both exit ACTIVITY.

dod.criterion: InteractionPoint supports capacity-2 with secondaryTile fields for partner position
occupiedPoints tracking distinguishes between 1/2 and 2/2 occupancy for capacity-2 points
A second agent can join an occupied capacity-2 point and paths to secondary use-tile
When either agent's activity duration expires, both agents transition to IDLE
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Add 6 activity bubble icons to statusIcons.ts
tasks.user_scenario: Small 8x8 icon bubble above agents doing activities — a TV icon when watching, book when reading, snack at vending machine, etc.
tasks.scope: Add 6 new 8x8 pixel sprites to statusIcons.ts: TV, book, snack, controller, dumbbell, paddle. Export as ACTIVITY_ICON_SPRITES. In renderer.ts, show activity icon for ACTIVITY-state characters.

dod.criterion: 6 new 8x8 SpriteData arrays in statusIcons.ts: tv, book, snack, controller, dumbbell, paddle
ACTIVITY_ICON_SPRITES record exported mapping FurnitureActivityType to sprite frames
renderStatusIcons shows activity icon above ACTIVITY-state characters instead of status icon
Icons are visually distinct at zoom >= 2 with clear silhouettes
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
